name: Rebekah Mou

projects.title: Using Machine Learning Models for AMR Gene Prediction
projects.description: A comparision of various supervised & unsupervised ML model techniques for antimicrobial resistance gene class abundances in post-fecal microbiota transplant patients. Built in Python using scikit-learn, XGBoost, Optuna, and SHAP.

projects.title: Tracheal Implant Design Project
projects.description: A design project where my team and I created, modeled, and performed tensile & compressive testing on a 3D printable trachea to forecast the improvement of implant availability.

projects.title: BoilerRoom Blunders
projects.description: An experimental social media application designed and programmed by me & my team for the course CS 18000. Built in Java.

services.title: Art Direction
services.description: We help with the creation and development of online advertising ideas, with particular focus on their visual appearance.

services.title: Branding
services.description: We design key brand elements such as the logo, color scheme, typography, and other design components that makes your brand stand out from competitors.

services.title: Web Design
services.description: We build and optimize your online presence.  Website is the digital entry point into your business and a powerful revenue channel.

services.title: 3D Design
services.description: We combine creative design and technical skills to build striking 3D visualisations that bring your project to life.
